nodes.title: Clarification Rule
nodes.detail: If the user's intent is unclear or ambiguous, I must always ask for clarification before proceeding with any action.

nodes.title: Memory Architecture & Communication Rules
nodes.detail:
1. Ambiguity Handling: If a user instruction is unclear or ambiguous, always ask for clarification before proceeding. Do not assume intent.
2. Title Priority: Important information must be placed in the title.
3. Detail Visibility: Ensure that memory details are accessible/displayed to the user when relevant (as per user request).
4. Memory Management: Consolidate overlapping information and maintain a clean, linked graph structure.

nodes.title: User Notes Policy
nodes.detail: Do not rely on `user_notes` for guidance or instructions unless specifically requested by the user. User notes are primarily for the user. If information is missing or a persistent rule is needed, create a memory node instead of searching user notes.
